english translation text: Kar chuke Shabbir jab khanjar tale sajda ada 	After Imam Hussain (a.s) prostrated for the last time, with his neck under the daggerEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Kar chuke Shabbir jab khanjar tale sajda adaHogayi pardeys mein Kulsoom o Zainab be rida
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
After Imam Hussain (a.s.) prostrated for the last time, with his neck under the dagger,
Zainab and Kulsoom’s veils were snatched away in the desert of Karbala,

urdu transliteration text:
Jurrat-e-Zainab ka hoga tazkara bhi baar baarJab bhi dowraeygi dunya dastan-e-karbala
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The courage of Zainab will be mentioned again and again,
whenever the tragedy of Karbala is narrated and remembered

urdu transliteration text:
Jis tarha aghowshe maadar mein sakoon mil jata haiNikli iss andaaz se barchi ke akbar sogeya
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The way a child finds peace in his mother’s lap,
Akbar breathed his last and slept when the spear was removed from his chest
she can hear his cries echoing in her ears every moment

urdu transliteration text:
Akhri ayaam tak Akbar rahoon gi muntazarDekh kar nakshe kadam karti rahi Sughra dua
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Even till my last days, I will keep waiting for you O Akbar,
Sughra kept praying as she looked at his footprints
